issues.comment: The second branch of the OR clause in deleteMany has no `method` filter. The first OR branch correctly scopes to WorkflowMethods.SMS, but the second OR branch will match any WorkflowReminder row with retryCount > 1, regardless of method — including EMAIL, WHATSAPP, and AI_PHONE_CALL reminders. When this SMS cron job runs, it will delete email reminders, WhatsApp reminders, and AI phone call reminders that happen to have retryCount > 1, even if those reminders are valid and managed by their own separate handler. The fix is to add `method: WorkflowMethods.SMS` to the second OR branch.
